Battle Cry 
 
 Barbarian Skill 
 
 Requires level: 18 
 Skill tree: Warcries 
 
 Frightens nearby enemies, lowers their defense, and damage. 
 View skill stats 
 
 Prerequisites:

Howl

Taunt

Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

title:
Battle Cry 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Fearsome cry that decreases enemies' defense rating and damage. 
 
 This one frightens nearby monsters reducing their defense and damage. A skill not used much in the later game, but one that's very good in situations. This warcry substantially lowers the target's defense and damage for the duration, and for a very low mana cost. The radius of the Warcry is small, so it's not of much use to 
 
 Whirlwind Barbarians, but Dual Wielders often use this to practically guarantee they'll hit their target, and take much less damage during the fight. It can be very useful for 
 
 Whirlwind Barbarians from Level 18 to 30, as they'll often have just 
 
 Bash for an attack at that point.

Battle Cry is subject to a 4 frame Next Hit Delay.

Description by Aelanwyr

5 
 Lore

Gifted Barbarian warriors can benefit from their connection to their totem animals to exploit the primal fears of their opponents.

Once a Barbarian unleashes the Battle Cry, even the legions of the dead will become so distracted that they falter in their quest for victory.

This permits the warrior an easy kill. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

Battle Orders 
 
 Barbarian Skill 
 
 Requires level: 24 
 Skill tree: Warcries 
 
 Increases Mana, Life, and Stamina of party members. 
 View skill stats 
 
 Prerequisites:

Howl

Shout 
 
 Synergies:

Shout +5 Seconds per Level

Battle Command +5 Seconds per Level

Data contributed by Stormlash

title:
Battle Orders 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
2 
 Description

Improves the maximum mana, life and stamina of you and your party. 
 
 The most popular party skill in the entire game, virtually no Barbarian is satisfied with less than 20 base points in this skill. It works on the Barbarian and all friendly players and their minions, increasing everyone's maximum hit points, stamina, and mana by a percentage. 
 
 The warcry lasts for a good amount of time, longer with every skill point in it, and most Barbarians max this one out quickly, and try to find bonus Warcries equipment to add even more to it. Dual "echoing" swords are a popular weapon switch item, for Barbarians who really want to up their 
 
 Battle Orders . 
 
 It should be cast after 
 
 Battle Command , so it has +1 skill bonus applied.

Description by Trang Oul

5 
 Lore

Although skillful in single combat, the Barbarian warrior also has a talent for group tactics.

It is this ability that makes him a natural leader in combat.

An experienced warrior can use this skill to better array his forces in battle, enhancing their ability to overcome the enemy. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

title:
Berserk 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

A powerful but reckless attack that increases damage and attack rating but decreases defense rating.

Berserk completely converts damage to magic damage so you cannot steal life/mana with 
 
 Berserk , even with 
 
 Life Tap . 
 
 You don't take damage from 
 
 Iron Maiden and 
 
 Thorns if you just go " 
 
 Berserk ". Because they only reflect physical damage, not magical. 
 
 For the stated duration afterward, your defense is zero. You also do not receive the 
 
 Iron Skin or Dexterity bonus. You can still block as if you are using a shield, however. A defense of 0 will let you block all the time, thus quite often hinder you from doing anything else. Consider not wearing a shield.

Description by Stormlash

5 
 Lore

There is a fine line between passion and rage, something the Barbarian warrior knows well.

A Barbarian must learn to tread this line while separating one from the other and drawing strength from both.

One of the most powerful combat skills a Barbarian can learn is to cross that line into rage, expending the sum of his energy and slaying everything without regard for consequences.

text:
4 years ago (pre-Resurrected) https://diablo2.io/post14468.html?sid=9506f040e569a2539f5eab5abead6171#p14468 
 
 4 years ago (pre-Resurrected) https://diablo2.io/post14468.html?sid=9506f040e569a2539f5eab5abead6171#p14468

Converts 100% physical weapon damage to magic damage.

Conversion occurs after +% Damage and a critical hit from a weapon Mastery, 
 
 Critical Strike or Deadly Strike are applied and before resistance is applied. 
 
 Damage Resist won't affect converted magic damage but Magic Resist will. 
 
 No damage is returned with 
 
 Thorns , 
 
 Iron Maiden and 
 
 Spirit of Barbs , no life is returned by 
 
 Life Tap and % Life Stolen per hit, and no mana is returned by % Mana Stolen per hit. 
 
 Defense debuff is applied on attack, regardless of whether or not that attack is successful. 
 
 Debuff duration approaches a second by level 60, when attacking continuously it should normally be reset long before it expires. 
 
 Defense debuff is applied to user after +% Defense but before + Defense vs Melee and + Defense vs Missile, so defense is not 0 when equipping items with those bonuses. 
 
 +(1-3) 
 
 Berserk (Barbarian Only) cannot normally spawn on ilvl >36 primal helms.

title:
Blade Fury 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

Using this skill, the Assassin throws several small blades, shredding her enemies with a barrage of metal. 
 
 Minimum Mana Required to Cast: 3

Blade Fury doesn't use up the durability of weapons, thus qualifies for ethereal weapons.

Blade Fury will attack constantly with 6 frames per attack. It does not work with 
 
 Burst of Speed or any other increased (or decreased) attack speed.

Blade Fury is indeed dependant on your attack rating although that's not displayed. Check your chances of hitting a monster with a normal attack to determine your chance with 
 
 Blade Fury .

Blade Fury does not work with piercing or 
 
 Exploding Arrow effects.

title:
Blade Fury 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Blade Fury works with effects on striking, but not on attack. Therefore, Curses and other effects can be triggered very fast. 
 
 The +min/max damage listed on the skill effectively works the same as +min/max damage added to your weapon on normal attacks, except that it is not reduced by the 3/4, 3/8 & 1/4 penalties. So for damage dealing purposes, on 
 
 Blade Fury , you could treat it exactly the same as an off-weapon source of +min/max damage, ignoring the penalty. This is especially important, as with high levels of blade skills, the +skill damage can deal more than the weapon "half" of the damage.

 Exploding Arrow effects.

Blade Fury works with effects on striking, but not on attack. Therefore, Curses and other effects can be triggered very fast. 
 
 The +min/max damage listed on the skill effectively works the same as +min/max damage added to your weapon on normal attacks, except that it is not reduced by the 3/4, 3/8 & 1/4 penalties. So for damage dealing purposes, on 
 
 Blade Fury , you could treat it exactly the same as an off-weapon source of +min/max damage, ignoring the penalty. This is especially important, as with high levels of blade skills, the +skill damage can deal more than the weapon "half" of the damage.

 Description

title:
Blade Sentinel 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
This skill allows the Assassin to throw a razor-sharp device that flies back and forth between the Assassin and its target, slicing any hostile creatures in its path. 
 
 Casting Delay: 1 second

Blade Sentinel is subject to a 25 frame Next Hit Delay. This means, as of Patch 2.7, that each individual blade can only damage a target once per second.

Blade Sentinel will not trigger % chance to cast on striking nor % chance to cast on attack effects, and will not apply open wounds.

Blade Sentinel is indeed dependant on your attack rating although that's not displayed. Check your chances of hitting a monster with a normal attack to determine your chance with 
 
 Blade Sentinel .

Description by Aelanwyr

title:
Blade Shield 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

This contrivance releases several small razors and uses magnetic forces to set them spinning about the Assassin, inflicting grievous wounds on any foe who approaches her too closely. 
 
 Using 
 
 Blade Shield will reduce the durability of your weapon. 
 
 This will not trigger "On Striking" spells. It will, however, trigger On Attack spells.

Blade Shield will trigger a "hitcheck" as soon as it is cast, so you can make it hit faster by standing within range of your target and spamming it.

Description by Stormlash

5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

Primary and Off-hand Claw Mods

The primary claw is the one equipped first and is above your gloves. The secondary is in the shield slot, above the 
 
 Boots . 
 
 These work on both primary and off-hand claw : 
 - Resistances 
 - Faster hit recovery 
 - Skills 
 - Stats like life, mana, strength etc. 
 
 For all skills, IAS only work on the primary claw. Normal attack get IAS from both claws .

* Half this damage applies if using a two handed weapon, i.e 1/8 in this case. 
 
 *** All blade skills have a fixed speed, regardless of IAS on weapons or gear. 
 
 Shuko-jutsu: The Art of the Claw

text:
Blades of Ice 
 
 Assassin Skill 
 
 Requires level: 24 
 Skill tree: Martial Arts 
 
 Charge-up Skill. 
 
 Consecutive hits add cold damage to finishing moves. 
 
 Can only be used with claw-class weapons. 
 
 Must use a dragon finishing move or normal attack to release charges. 
 View skill stats 
 
 Prerequisites:

Fists of Fire

Claws of Thunder 
 
 Synergies:

Phoenix Strike +8% Cold Damage per Level

Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

Charging the ether around her claw blades, the trained Assassin can chill opponents with a vicious rake of her razors. (Requires equipped Claw-class weapon.) 
 
 When this skill is used while the Assassin has two Claw-class weapons equipped, the Assassin will attack with both claws simultanously, which can result in two charges being obtained with a single use of the skill.

Description by Aelanwyr

5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

title:
Blaze 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
This skill functions by leaving size 1 missiles in each tile the caster travels through for up to 20 seconds. These missiles are represented visually by the flame effect of this skill, last for [slvl+2.56] seconds, and are not destroyed on collision. 
 
 The listed Fire Damage presumes a target is standing over 3 
 
 Blaze missiles. However, larger targets can touch more than 3 tiles simultaneously. Furthermore, multiple 
 
 Blaze missiles can occupy the same tile if the caster enters a tile twice. Accordingly, the actual damage dealt by this skill can far exceed the listed damage under the correct circumstances.

title:
Blessed Aim 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
When an aura enchanted elite monster has the 
 
 Blessed Aim aura, the aura level depends on the monster level: max([mlvl/5],1) 
 
 mlvl 4 = slvl 1 
 
 mlvl 10 = slvl 2 
 
 mlvl 15 = slvl 3 
 
 mlvl 20 = slvl 4 
 
 mlvl 25 = slvl 5 
 
 mlvl 30 = slvl 6 
 
 mlvl 35 = slvl 7 
 
 mlvl 40 = slvl 8 
 
 mlvl 45 = slvl 9 
 
 mlvl 50 = slvl 10 
 
 mlvl 55 = slvl 11 
 
 mlvl 60 = slvl 12 
 
 mlvl 65 = slvl 13 
 
 mlvl 70 = slvl 14 
 
 mlvl 75 = slvl 15 
 
 mlvl 80 = slvl 16 
 
 mlvl 85 = slvl 17 
 
 mlvl 90 = slvl 18 
 
 mlvl 95 = slvl 19 1) 
 
 mlvl 100 = slvl 20 2) 
 1) Only possible in TZ 92+ (character level 90+), except for 
 
 Griswold , 
 
 Radament and 
 
 Nihlathak , who can have level 19 
 
 Blessed Aim already at TZ 89 due to their inherent extra +3 level bonus 
 2) Only possible in TZ 94+ and only for the following monsters: 
 
 Griswold , 
 
 Radament and 
 
 Nihlathak (who all have an inherent extra +3 level bonus) 
 
 Source: 
 Aura Enchanted - Amazon Basin Wiki

title:
Blessed Hammer 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Vigor +14% Magic Damage per Level

Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

Summons an ethereal hammer that spirals outwards damaging enemies it hits. 
 
 This sends out a little glowing Hammer. The Hammer spins around you making a wider and wider turn until it disappears. 
 
 Blessed Hammer has the ability to damage multiple enemies if it hits them. 
 
 Does not ignore the immunity of monsters that are immune to magic. 
 
 Also receives bonuses from 
 
 Concentration . 
 
 % Mana and Life Steal bonuses from items and weapons do not apply to 
 
 Blessed Hammer .

Description by Stormlash

5 
 Lore

The Visions of Akarat tell of a hopeless battle.

Legions of the undead had laid siege to a small convent of nuns who were the keepers of a sacred relic, the Hammer of Ghrab Thaar.

Suspended over a fiery chasm within the convent, the sisters knew the Hammer to be a powerful vessel of the Light and vowed never to allow it to fall into the hands of evil.

With no weapons of their own, and no one to defend them, the nuns sacrificed themselves to destroy the hammer.

title:
Blessed Hammer 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Rather than let the undead despoil the church and the relic, they took the hammer and plunged themselves into the fiery chasm.

At that moment, a powerful force of Light washed over the undead legion, striking them down where they stood.

Since that time a well-trained Paladin is able to tap the remnants of this released energy, whirling a magical hammer to strike down his adversaries, especially the forces of the walking dead.

title:
Blood Golem 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Golem Mastery See skill

Summon Resist See skill

Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

Creates a golem that shares with you the life it steals and damage it receives. 
 
 The 
 
 Blood Golem 's life drain is now based completely on its own attack rather than the total amount of your enemy's hit points. Furthermore, if it is affected by a damage return ability like 
 
 Thorns or 
 
 Iron Maiden , the life drained is based on its attack rather than how much damage the enemy attacker did to it. 
 
 Hit Points stolen by the 
 
 Blood Golem are not subtracted from the target. 
 
 The Golem gains 70% of the health it steals while the player gains 30%. If the current life + stolen life > maximum life of the 
 
 Blood Golem , the Hit Point overflow goes to the Necromancer. If the current life + stolen life > maximum life of the Necromancer, the Hit Point overflow returns to the Golem up to the maximum life for each target.

Description by Stormlash

5 
 Lore

Utilizing a small quantity of his own blood, the Necromancer is able to give life to a creature neither living nor dead, yet formed of human tissue.

title:
Bone Prison 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

Creates a barrier of fossilized Bone around your target. 
 
 Player vs Player: You can use 
 
 Bone Prison on other players. 
 
 Cast 
 
 Bone Prison on bosses or players and curse them with 
 
 Iron Maiden . If they try to escape the 
 
 Bone Prison they will harm themselves. You can also summon a Golem inside the 
 
 Bone Prison to fight whatever is inside. Cast spells such as 
 
 Bone Spear or 
 
 Bone Spirit at the enemies inside the 
 
 Bone Prison . 
 
 Note, this is not the same 
 
 Bone Prison that Diablo uses. Diablo has his own 
 
 Bone Prison type spell that no player can use.

Description by Stormlash

5 
 Lore

Similar to the Bone Wall, a Necromancer with this skill can summon a spirit wall of bone in the form of an enclosing ring.

This prison traps all enemies within its circumference.

Imprisoned within a cage of bone, the captives are held helpless until they can summon the strength to break through its skeletal confines or the Necromancer loses his hold over the spirits. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

Bone Spear fires a projectile that deals magic damage and can pass through any number of targets. 
 
 It does less damage to each target than 
 
 Bone Spirit (until very high levels), but can hit multiple enemies and is very effective against large mobs or in narrow hallways, such as inside the 
 
 Maggot Lair Level 1 .

Description by Stormlash

5 
 Lore

Also known as the Talon of Trang'Oul, this spell summons a long shaft of bone issuing forth from the caster and piercing any opponents in its path.

Since the force of this projectile is mystical as well as physical it can pass through one opponent and carry on to the next, rending and tearing through whatever is in its path. 
 
 5

text:
Bone Spear Hit Recovery : 
 Most melee attacks and skills have the good 16 divisor, some ranged attacks have the crappier 8 divisor. Bone spear is the only true non-attack spell which has the crappy 8 divisor. 
 This means for Bone spear to put someone into hit recovery without them having the stun debuff on them already, it has to deal: 
 1/8 of their max HP for a 37.5% chance 
 1/4 of their max HP for a 75% chance 
 1/2 of their max HP for a 100% chance 
 Hit Recovery FAQ

Bone Spirit 
 
 Necromancer Skill 
 
 Requires level: 30 
 Skill tree: Poison and Bone Spells 
 
 Spirit tracks down a target or finds one of its own. 
 View skill stats 
 
 Prerequisites:

Teeth

Corpse Explosion

Bone Spear

Bone Wall +8% Magic Damage per Level

title:
Bone Spirit 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Bone Spear +8% Magic Damage per Level

Bone Prison +8% Magic Damage per Level

Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

Releases a Spirit of the restless undead that tracks its target or finds one of its own. 
 
 Player vs Player: You can cast 
 
 Bone Spirit at someone trapped in a 
 
 Bone Prison and it won't damage the 
 
 Bone Prison . 
 
 In addition to doing a lot of damage, 
 
 Bone Spirit follows a target making it easy to aim. You can also fire off several Bone spirits at once ensuring a target will be destroyed.

Bone Spirit will hit the nearest monster if it is launched with no target. If the monsters are too far away from you, the 
 
 Bone Spirit will continue on without hitting anything. If you select a target and fire more than one 
 
 Bone Spirit and the first 
 
 Bone Spirit kills the Monster, the other 
 
 Bone Spirit will continue on without hitting anything. 
 
 So select no monsters if you don't care which monster is hit. Select a monster if you want the 
 
 Bone Spirit to hit them specifically but be warned additional shots after they die will be wasted.

Oblivion Knight in The 
 
 Chaos Sanctuary of Act IV also cast 
 
 Bone Spirit .

title:
Bone Spirit 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Description by Stormlash

5 
 Lore

This powerful spell briefly summons the spirit of a vengeful revenant.

This skeletal specter immediately seeks out its objective, ripping free a portion of the target's soul and carrying it away to the plane of the dead.

This is not a true summoning spell, however, as the Necromancers have not yet determined how to control these wraiths.

For now, it is enough that they are able to shield themselves and their companions from their wrath! 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

title:
Bone Wall 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Creates an impassable barrier of Bone and debris. 
 
 This skill calls a durable wall of Bone up out of the ground . 
 
 The wall serves as a barrier and will draw monsters to attack it, damaging themselves if they're cursed by 
 
 Iron Maiden or affected by 
 
 Iron Golem 's 
 
 Thorns aura.

Description by Trang Oul

5 
 Lore

This spell enables the Necromancer to call upon the remnants of the spirits of all the creatures who have ever died in the area.

It accumulates their fossilized remains and summons forth from the ground a barrier of dense, fossilized bone.

This spell is an effective method for keeping adversaries from reaching a Necromancer, while allowing him to attack from range or make his escape. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

title:
Carrion Vine 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Carrion Vine (as well as the other Vine skills) is generally quite weak. It replenishes a small amount of life with each corpse consumed. Although it does improve with additional points, it will still die easily, and the amount of life it gives levels off as you add more skill points. 
 
 "The sentient plant summoned by this skill draws the corpses of your enemies into the Ground , where it rapidly decomposes them, giving their life energies to the Druid who summoned it."

title:
Carrion Vine

text:
Carrion Vine 
 Min Life and Max Life values are averaged to always be the same, accurate to the tooltip

 Lycanthropy and 
 
 Oak Sage .

title:
Chain Lightning 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Skill
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Nova +4% Lightning Damage per Level

Lightning +4% Lightning Damage per Level

Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

Creates a bolt of lightning that arcs through several targets.

Chain Lightning jumps from one target to the next and can be quite impressive when cast on a cluster of enemies. 
 
 It's much less effective against single targets, however, and is slower to hit enemies than Lightning, which passes straight through as quickly as the Sorceress casts it.

Chain Lightning is subject to a 4 frame Next Hit Delay. This can cause the lightning arc to "fizzle out" if it tries to bounce back and forth between targets that are too close together.

Description by Aelanwyr

5 
 Lore

An improved and more complicated version of the Lightning spell, Chain Lightning arcs from foe to foe, branching out until all of its energy is dissipated.

The stench of burnt flesh and ozone is often all that remains after this spell is cast. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

Creates a bolt of lightning that arcs through several targets.

Chain Lightning jumps from one target to the next and can be quite impressive when cast on a cluster of enemies. 
 
 It's much less effective against single targets, however, and is slower to hit enemies than Lightning, which passes straight through as quickly as the Sorceress casts it.

Chain Lightning is subject to a 4 frame Next Hit Delay. This can cause the lightning arc to "fizzle out" if it tries to bounce back and forth between targets that are too close together.

The Diablo games have some shocking moments for noob players: 
 
 D1: The Butcher hacks you into fresh meat. You scream, uninstall the game, throw your CD out the window and hide in your bed (thanks CarbotAnimations) 
 
 D1: Suddenly Diablo appears from behind a wall. 
 
 D2: A dieing 
 
 Rakanishu erupts into lightning. 
 
 D2: 
 
 Duriel smacks you into a wall. 
 
 D3: You see the bright colours and uninstall the game (no butcher needed).

title:
Fallen 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Monster
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Fallen may be raised by 
 
 Fallen Shaman . Seek out any Shamans in the area and destroy them first. 
 
 Fallen that have been raised do not give experience.

Fallen in the area may run away when they see their fellow friends killed. Use this to your advantage to break up groups of 
 
 Fallen that have collected around you.

Fallen have a chance to deal Fire damage in Nightmare and Hell. 
 Carvers have a chance to deal Cold damage in Nightmare and Hell. 
 Devilkin have a chance to deal Lightning damage in Nightmare and Hell. 
 Dark Ones have a chance to deal Poison damage in Nightmare and Hell. 
 
 Guest Carvers have a chance to deal Cold damage in Nightmare and Hell. 
 Guest Devilkin have a chance to deal Lightning damage in Nightmare and Hell. 
 Guest Dark Ones have a chance to deal Fire damage in Nightmare and Hell. 
 Guest Warped Ones are the special Minions of 
 
 Colenzo the Annihilator and have a chance to deal Cold damage.

Description by Teebling

Jail Level 3

Inner Cloister

Catacombs Level 4

5 
 Lore

These demonic imps have, of late, become very common throughout the woodlands of the Western Kingdoms. Small and vicious, many worry that if these beings were to band together in large numbers, they might easily overthrow some of the smaller cities in the region. Luckily, cowardice appears to be one of the chief features of this species, and they quickly retreat at the sight of one of their brethren falling in battle.

Although Fallen seek to congregate together, so far only small encampments have been found, with no obvious overall organization. While there are wild rumors of Fallen Shaman Priests leading camps of Fallen, supposedly with the power to raise them from the dead, this has yet to be substantiated.

Carvers and Dark Ones, tougher cousins of the Fallen, have also been seen closer to the fringes of civilization, indicating that the Brothers' sway may be stronger than previously understood. 
 
 5

title:
Fallen Shaman 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Monster
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Surrounded by their lower peers they do not tremble at the sight of their brethren falling in combat. If not dealt with quickly you will face an uphill treadmill of foes. 
 
 They can be heard calling the names of their leaders: 
 
 Bishibosh and 
 
 Colenzo the Annihilator .

Fallen Shaman will raise 
 
 Fallen . Target and kill any 
 
 Fallen Shaman you see before attacking their companions. 
 
 Fallen Shaman shoot Firebolts, which can be avoided with some care. 
 
 Guest Carver Shamans shoot Glacial Spikes and have a chance to deal Cold damage. 
 Guest Devilkin Shamans shoot Fireballs have a chance do deal Lightning damage. 
 Guest Dark Shamans shoot Fireballs have a chance to deal Fire damage.

Description by Teebling

5 
 Appearances

Den of Evil

Cold Plains

Tristram

Black Marsh

Outer Cloister

Barracks

Cathedral

Catacombs Level 1

Catacombs Level 2

Catacombs Level 4

5 
 Lore

Only the bravest and smartest of the Fallen attain the coveted training required to rise to the position of Shaman. Their mastery of fire is evident in the balls of flame that they cast to incinerate their enemies.

title:

5 
 Lore

Defensive quills dot the backs of these troublesome creatures. All species of Spike Fiends can fire their quills at range, and more developed variants have a more vicious rate of fire and tend to fire in volleys.

At least two subspecies, the Quill Rat and the Thorned Beast, are known to fire their quills without provocation. Caravans traveling to the Rogue Pass have reported several attacks by these aggressive monsters.

The lowest rank of the undead, zombies befoul much of the wilderness of the Western Kingdoms, as well as the tombs and crypts of the whole of Sanctuary. Zombies serve the darkness blindly and without thought, attacking only with their bare hands.

They move slowly, but with relentless determination, seeking to consume the flesh of the living. They are simple-minded and easily outwitted, but in large groups can overwhelm the unwary.

title:
Wendigo 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Monster
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Large monstrous creatures that become enraged with speed as they come closer to death . 
 
 Wailing Beasts have a chance to deal Fire damage in Nightmare and Hell.

Description by Teebling

5 
 Appearances

Spawns in area(s):

Den of Evil

Cold Plains

Hole Level 1

Hole level 2

Black Marsh

Outer Cloister

Canyon of the Magi

Ruined Temple

Disused Fane

Forgotten Reliquary

5 
 Lore

Large but agile, these creatures are most often found in the wilderness, but are also reported to occupy the caves and dungeons of the Western Kingdoms.

Sadly, the Gargantuan Beast, Brute, and Yeti (Wendigo subspecies) were previously known to coexist peacefully with humans, avoiding contact whenever possible. Chaos' ill effects have changed them, as they are now quick to anger and attack with huge, sweeping blows of their massive claws.

Once provoked, they do not relent until their opponent is slain or they themselves have fallen. Few live to tell the tale of an angered Wendigo, but those that have exclaim how nothing is more terrifying than the sound of these angry creatures bearing down on the attack. 
 
 5

5 
 Appearances

Dark Wood

Pit Level 2

Tamoe Highland

Monastery Gate

Outer Cloister

Barracks

Ruined Temple

Disused Fane

Forgotten Reliquary

Matron's Den

5 
 Lore

The corruption of the Sisterhood is perhaps the worst atrocity that the surviving Rogues endure.

The sight of their own sisters, marching against them in service of their enemy, drives the Sisterhood into deep despair. The tainted Sisters are seldom caught alone, preferring to attack in groups.

Many of the corrupted ones have forgotten their skills with ranged weapons, or are so driven by Hell's rage, that they blindly melee with whatever weapon is at hand.

 Lore

The corruption of the Sisterhood has also turned many who were skilled in the use of spears and javelins to the cause of evil.

These warriors now use their talents to eviscerate those who seek to stop the corruption that is slowly spreading across Khanduras.

Using a mix of piercing weapons, these Corrupt Rogues can be specially dangerous when they back their prey into a corner and use the length of their weapons to gain a tactical advantage.

text:
Skeletons are Undead and are vulnerable to Undead-specific spells and abilities. 
 
 You cannot steal Life or Mana from Skeletons. 
 
 Returned have a chance to deal Lightning and Cold damage. 
 Bone Warriors have a chance to deal Lightning and Cold damage.

Description by Teebling

5

Stony Tomb Level 2

5 
 Lore

Fierce undead warriors, skeletons do not seek to consume the flesh of the living, but only to extinguish the life of their victims.

Skeletons, unrelenting in their goal, move faster than zombies and have some spark of intelligence as demonstrated by their use of weapons.

These bony undead have been observed wielding swords, clubs, bows, and even armor and shields, and are often equipped in the same armament in which they fell.

title:
Skeleton Archer 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Monster
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
2 
 Description

Skeleton Archers are Undead and are vulnerable to Undead-specific spells and abilities. 
 
 You cannot steal Life or Mana from 
 
 Skeleton Archers. 
 
 Burning Dead Archers shoot Fire 
 
 Arrows . 
 Horror Archers shoot Lightning 
 
 Arrows . 
 Guest Returned Archers and Bone Archers have a chance to deal Cold damage. 
 Guest Burning Dead Archers shoot Fire 
 
 Arrows . 
 Guest Horror Archers have a chance to deal damage of a random element.

Description by Teebling

5 
 Appearances

Spawns in area(s):

Tristram

Underground Passage Level 1

Underground Passage Level 2

Dark Wood

Tamoe Highland

Monastery Gate

Sewers Level 1

Sewers Level 2

Harem Level 2

Palace Cellar Level 1

Palace Cellar Level 2

Palace Cellar Level 3

5 
 Lore

Skeletons do not seek to consume the flesh of the living as do many of their other undead kindred, but seek only to slay those who live to increase their ranks.

Single-minded in their mission to slay the living, some of these animated warriors now use the bows that served them in life to deadly effect. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

text:
Skeleton Mage are Undead and are vulnerable to Undead-specific spells and abilities.

Skeleton Mage have elemental attacks such as Poison, Cold, Fire, and Lightning. Stats are listed for Poison, Cold, Fire and Lightning version of 
 
 Skeleton Mage , respectively, while Burning Dead Mages only have 3 variations

0

Zwippie

1 month ago (pre-Resurrected) https://diablo2.io/post4143108.html?sid=5f382360a8b9841e932ce31678c33f0d#p4143108 
 
 1 month ago (pre-Resurrected) https://diablo2.io/post4143108.html?sid=5f382360a8b9841e932ce31678c33f0d#p4143108

As all other type of 
 
 Skeleton enemies, you can't use life steal on them, nor mana steal. This is also true for Ghost types like 
 
 Wraith and Gloam. 
 This goes for all 
 
 Skeleton & ghost enemies that you find throughout all acts but NOT undead type of enemies. 
 Zombies, Hollow One, Dried Corpse etc and all their counterparts. On those types of enemies, life & mana steal works without issue. 
 Look at like this, if it has flesh on it, you can life steal, if not, you can't.

title:
Goatman 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Monster
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
An animal humanoid is an easier variant to raise then creating a new being or converting a human. A goat will not resist the temptation to walk upright and wield an axe . All you need are some human arms and a torso. 
 
 The Night Clan has a chance to deal Lightning damage in Nightmare and Hell. 
 The Blood Clan has a chance to deal Fire damage in Nightmare and Hell. 
 The Hell Clan has a chance to deal Fire damage in Nightmare and Hell. 
 
 Guest Moon Clan drains Mana on striking. 
 Guest Night Clan has a chance to deal Cold damage. 
 Guest Blood Clan has a chance to deal Fire damage. 
 Guest Death Clan has a chance to deal Cold damage. 
 Guest Hell Clan has a chance to deal Cold damage.

Description by Teebling

 Lore

title:
Goatman 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Monster
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
These demonic atrocities have been seen in many regions of Sanctuary and within the Western Kingdoms. 
 
 These mutations of Evil are half man, half goat and signify the foulest form of Hell's will. Once confined to only the darkest labyrinths, they now venture out into the wilderness, ever closer to the encampments of man.

Walking upright as men, with heads of horned goats, they tread upon cloven hooves and are skilled with weapons of war. They are cunning, working together to form organized clans that accomplish the desires of their devilish commanders.

Their strength is immense and some of the more powerful clans are rumored to guard the lairs of Hell's more renowned demons. 
 
 5

title:
Blood Hawk 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Monster
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Look for 
 
 Blood Hawk Nests and destroy them to prevent additional Blood Hawks from being created. 
 In Nightmare and Hell, 
 
 Blood Hawk types have a chance to deal Poison damage. 
 
 Guest Foul Crows have a chance to deal Poison damage. 
 Guest Blood Hawks can steal Life. 
 Guest Black Raptors can drain Mana. 
 Guest Cloud Stalkers have a chance to deal Lightning damage.

Description by Teebling

5 
 Appearances

Spawns in area(s):

Stony Field

Black Marsh

Far Oasis

Spider Forest

5 
 Lore

Spawned from nests that have infested the wildernesses, these winged monsters assail passersby with quick swooping attacks.

They retreat quickly after an attack, and a flock of them can be difficult to eliminate if the nest is not dealt with hastily.

Both Foul Crows and Black Raptors have been spied in the regions of Entsteig. 
 
 5

title:
Blood Hawk 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Monster
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
As a flying mob, one thing to watch out for when fighting and killing these is to avoid killing them over an unpassable surface (ponds in A2, rivers in A3), as this will cause no drops or loot to spawn. Same goes for the A5 variant which is sometimes encountered in 
 
 Bloody Foothills / 
 
 Frigid Highlands , which might be unintentionally killed over cliff Edge tiles, negating all drops.

text:
Tainted inflict Lightning Damage, shoot Lightning Balls, and are Lightning Resistant.

Description by Teebling

5 
 Appearances

Spawns in area(s):

Hole Level 1

Hole level 2

Underground Passage Level 1

Underground Passage Level 2

Monastery Gate

Cathedral

Catacombs Level 1

Catacombs Level 2

Catacombs Level 3

Catacombs Level 4

City of the Damned

5 
 Lore

These malformed demons gain their strength and resilience from the natural element of lightning.

While slow of foot, these beasts deliver a palpable hit when engaged at close range and can absorb a fair amount of damage.

Tainted are perhaps an even greater threat when wounded, however, as this is when they retreat and direct orbs of lightning at their enemies.

title:
Giant Spider 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Monster
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Spiders spin webs and have 50% faster health regeneration than normal monsters. 
 
 Poison Spinners have a chance to deal Poison damage. 
 Flame Spiders have a chance to deal Fire damage. 
 Spider Magi have a chance to deal Poison damage. 
 Arach have a chance to deal Poison damage.

Description by Teebling

5 
 Appearances

Spawns in area(s):

Forgotten Sands

Arachnid Lair

Spider Cavern

Arachnid Lair

Spider Cavern

Ruined Temple

Disused Fane

Forgotten Reliquary

5 
 Lore

Several species of giant arachnids inhabit the jungle regions of Kehjistan. One of the most deadly of these spiders, the Poison Spinner, is found not far from the city of Kurast.

Even in their largest forms, the giant arachnids had never been much of a problem for the inhabitants of the tropical forests. The Prime Evils have changed them, however, as large numbers of the spiders now actively seek meals of the human variety.

These creatures are highly poisonous and generally have fatal bites. Despite their defenses they often flee when struck, sometimes spinning webs to entangle and slow pursuers. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

title:
Wraith 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Monster
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
When the dead no longer have the bones to rise, they are summoned in spirit form. 
 
 Wraiths always drain mana with their attacks. They are also capable of passing through solid objects. 
 
 Normal Wraiths cannot drop weapons and armor, whereas Unique and Champion types can.

Description by Khegan

5 
 Appearances

Tower Cellar Level 1

Tower Cellar Level 2

Tower Cellar Level 3

Tower Cellar Level 4

Jail Level 1

Jail Level 2

Jail Level 3

Cathedral

Arcane Sanctuary

Tal Rasha's Tomb

Flayer Dungeon Level 1

Flayer Dungeon Level 2

Flayer Dungeon Level 3

5 
 Lore

Wraiths are ethereal physical manifestations of tortured souls from the planes of the Hells. Often called "ghosts" or "evil spirits" by mortals, these shades are driven by an intense hatred for the un-suffering living.

Wraiths often inhabit the darkest dungeons, having either been drawn there by the imprint of pain and suffering, or summoned and bound by powerful mages, to serve as unwilling guardians.

These ethereal creatures can pass through solid objects, and contact with a wraith can quickly drain one's life force.

title:
Fetish 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Monster
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Fetish are known for their hit and run tactics. Use Cold attacks to freeze 
 
 Fetish to prevent them from running away. Hire an Ironwolf Cold Mage to freeze 
 
 Fetish for you and to help you locate where they are hiding. Any kind of splash damage such as 
 
 Fireball or 
 
 Dragon Tail helps greatly against 
 
 Fetish since they tend to bunch up close together.

Description by Teebling

5 
 Appearances

Spawns in area(s):

Catacombs Level 1

Catacombs Level 2

Spider Forest

Spider Forest

Flayer Jungle

Flayer Dungeon Level 1

Flayer Dungeon Level 2

Flayer Dungeon Level 3

Flayer Jungle

Flayer Dungeon Level 1

Flayer Dungeon Level 2

Flayer Dungeon Level 3

5 
 Lore

Attacking with enormous, vicious knives or at range with deadly blow darts, the Fetish are native inhabitants to the jungles that surround Kurast.

Known cannibals, they are small, intelligent beings in league with the forces of Hell. Individually, Fetishes are weak and easy to kill. However, they are much more formidable when attacking en masse.

When accompanied by a Shaman, they are doubly dangerous, as their Shaman possess the ability to revive their fallen kin.

Vampires regenerate health at 2x the normal regen rate. "Guest Monster" Vampires (those found in Act 5) regenerate life at nearly 3x the normal rate. 
 
 They can be some of the more difficult monsters to kill, having high hit points, high resistances, evasive AI coupled with fast movement speed, life steal, and the aforementioned increased life regeneration rates.

text:
Spawns in area(s):

5 
 Lore

When the trauma of death is especially great, the spirit of the slain is sometimes bound to an item associated with that death.

Such is the case with these animated weapons that were once wielded by warriors who died while engaging in the violent act of melee combat.

The last thought on the minds of those who once held these blades was to destroy their opponent and so they will slash out in an attempt to achieve that final goal. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

If there are fewer than five monsters remaining in The Den of Evil and a 
 
 Fallen Shaman resurrects enough 
 
 Fallen to increase the number above 5, the quest window will display, Monsters remaining: 666. 
 
 If you complete the quest Den of Evil , the area name change from The Den of Evil to The Cave . 
 
 When starting act 1 leave a Town Portal by the Den of Evil , run to the 
 
 Cold Plains waypoint, go to town to sell items and buy a few Stamina potions, and take the Town portal back. Way faster and more efficient. 
 
 you can find several dead rogue's holding potential treasure.

title:

                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Area

text:
The 
 
 Pit Level 2 holds a superchest and a handful of unique and champion monsters. 
 
 At alvl 85 in Hell, some pretty amazing items can drop. The difficulty of the Act 1 monsters within can be easier to clear than other levels in the game on Hell difficulty. These two things make it a very popular area for magic find farming. 
 
 Number of elite pack spawns: 
 Normal: 1 - 2 
 Nightmare: 2 - 3 
 Hell: 2 - 3

title:

         • diablo2.io
text:
One of two short tombs to plunder in the 
 
 Burial Grounds . 
 
 Not one of the most popular areas to farm due to its location, it can however be a ideal place for niche builds focused on killing the undead, like a FoH paladin or characters with a lot of +dmg to undead. It is worth farming as it is one of a few levels with area level 85. 
 
 Number of elite pack spawns: 
 Normal: 1 
 Nightmare: 3 - 4 
 Hell: 4 - 5

title:

text:
2 
 Description

Tower Cellar Level 5 is the last level of the Black Tower and you'll find 
 
 The Countess here. 
 
 She will use 
 
 Fire Wall on the entrances to her room, but is a fairly easy kill otherwise and drops a bunch of runes. For this reason Tower Cellar 5 is one of the most farmed areas in this Act (besides Terror Zones ). 
 
 The weapon and armor racks in the wings of this cellar are often farmed on Hell difficulty for base items. 
 
 Number of elite pack spawns: 
 Normal: 1 
 Nightmare: 2 - 3 
 Hell: 3 - 4 
 
 Superunique: 
 
 The Countess

Description by Trang Oul

title:
Rogue Encampment 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Area
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
The 
 
 Rogue Encampment is the first town in Diablo II and the starting point of the game. 
 
 This town has few denizens, such as: 
 
 Akara : Rogue Priestess, leader of the rogues. Heals the player, sells potions, scrolls and caster-oriented weaponry.

Charsi : The blacksmith of the rogues in the camp. Of barbarian descent.

Deckard Cain : Cain resides in the camp after the player has completed the quest 
 
 The Search for Cain . Identifies items.

Gheed : A gambler who is also a merchant.

Kashya : Leader of the Rogue army. Provides rogue mercenaries.

Warriv : A merchant who provides advice but nothing else. After the last quest, he takes the player to 
 
 Lut Gholein .

Description by Krythic

Follow the road, take the path that's closer to the wall or looks like it will end up in the middle of the wall to get to 
 
 Stony Field . If you see yourself going towards a corner then that path lead to 
 
 Burial Grounds . 
 
 The 
 
 Cold Plains waypoint is found next to the entrance from 
 
 Blood Moor . 
 
 you can find loose rock, chest, dead rogue and loose boulder holding potential treasure.

 Blood Moor , you can always find the 
 
 Cold Plains by simply following the road out of town. It will eventually fork; one path will lead to 
 
 The Den of Evil , while the other will lead to the 
 
 Cold Plains .

Deckard Cain

text:
Deckard is an icon of the Diablo universe. He possesses in depth knowledge of the world of Sanctuary , and guides heroes through their journey in all acts of the game. After rescuing him in the Act 1 quest " 
 
 The Search for Cain ", he will identify items at no cost. Should this quest not be completed, in subsequent acts he will identify all unidentified items for a price of 100 
 
 Gold each.

title:
Charsi 
        
        
        
                                  
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Hi there. I'm 
 
 Charsi , the Blacksmith here in camp. It's good to see some strong adventurers around here. 
 
 Many of our Sisters fought bravely against Diablo when he first attacked the town of 
 
 Tristram . 
 
 They came back to us true veterans, bearing some really powerful items. Seems like their victory was short-lived, though... Most of them are now corrupted by 
 
 Andariel .

title:
Flavie 
        
        
        
                                  
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
In the internal dialogue files of the game, 
 
 Flavie 's ID is "Navi", which is probably short for "Navigator", as she guides players to 
 
 The Den of Evil , and warns them not to go forward until they have done so. A second reference for her is "RogueSignpostGossip(1-5)", which seems to imply that the dialogue for her was originally designed to come from some sort of interactable geometry instead of a Rogue Scout. 
 
 Regardless, she's all alone out there, and many players forget about her, or pay her no attention at all. So toss a few potions on the Ground for her, just to show how much you appreciate her.

16

7

title:
The Search for Cain 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Quest
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Rewards: 
 A ring from Akara 
 Free item identification from Deckard Cain 
 Cost of buying items in Rogue Encampment reduced by 10%

Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

Travel from the 
 
 Stony Field through the 
 
 Underground Passage Level 1 to the 
 
 Dark Wood . 
 
 Find the Tree of Inifuss and click on it to get the 
 
 Scroll of Inifuss . 
 
 Take the 
 
 Scroll of Inifuss to 
 
 Akara where she will translate it. 
 
 Take the translated Scroll to the 
 
 Stony Field and click on the five Cairn Stones in the correct sequence. 
 
 Go through the red portal that opens up in the middle of the stones to 
 
 Tristram . 
 
 Find Cain in his cage in 
 
 Tristram and free him by clicking on it. 
 
 Return to the 
 
 Rogue Encampment for your reward.

Description by Stormlash

4 
 Encounters on this Quest

Other NPCs & Superuniques: 
 Rakanishu

Treehead Woodfist

Griswold

Deckard Cain

Areas of interest:

Dark Wood

Stony Field

Tristram 
 
 Items utilised:

Scroll of Inifuss

5 
 Lore

Akara informs you that you are facing an evil difficult to comprehend and there is one Horadrim Sage, schooled in the most arcane history and lore who could help you.

title:
The Search for Cain 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Quest
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
He is known as Deckard Cain.

You must travel to Tristram to find him.

To begin your quest the people of the Rogue encampment tell you to find bark from the Tree of Inifuss which holds mystical runes.

Take the bark to Akara.

Once she has translated it she tells that you find the Cairn Stones and touch them in the order written. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

title:
The Den of Evil 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Quest
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
The Den of Evil can always be found by simply following the road out of town. The road will eventually fork; one path will lead to the Den, the other will lead to the 
 
 Cold Plains . 
 
 One tip for progressing efficiently is to open a Town Portal near the entrance to the Den when you find it. Then, proceed to find the 
 
 Cold Plains waypoint. Once you have activated the waypoint, return to town and enter the portal you opened earlier to access and clear the Den. Once you've cleared the Den, you can return to town for your reward and use the waypoint to quickly continue into the 
 
 Cold Plains .

Sisters' Burial Grounds 
 
 Act 1 Quest • Optional 
 2 Search the Cold Plains for the path leading to the Burial Grounds.

Kashya

 1 free mercenary hired 
 Hire mercenaries from Kashya

Data contributed by Teebling

2 
 Description

title:
Sisters' Burial Grounds 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Quest
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
In this quest, 
 
 Kashya asks you to hunt down 
 
 Blood Raven in the 
 
 Burial Grounds in order to lay her spirit to rest. 
 
 Using throwing potions will speed up the process greatly. 
 
 Stay away from the pack of 
 
 Zombie that surround her, unless you want to get surrounded. 
 
 A good follow-up to this quest is running 
 
 Mausoleum and 
 
 Crypt , which are both in the vicinity.

Description by Stormlash

4 
 Encounters on this Quest

Other NPCs & Superuniques:

Blood Raven

Areas of interest:

Burial Grounds 
 
 Items utilised: None

5 
 Lore

Kashya's Rogue scouts have reported an abomination in the Monastery graveyard. Blood Raven, one of the Rogue's finest captains in the battle against Diablo at Tristram, has been corrupted by Andariel.

She can be found in the Monastery graveyard raising the Rogue's dead as zombies. You must help the Rogues destroy her. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

 Description

title:
The Forgotten Tower 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Quest
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
This quest begins when you read a Moldy 
 
 Tome found randomly in the 
 
 Stony Field . 
 
 Travel through the 
 
 Underground Passage Level 1 and pass 
 
 Dark Wood into 
 
 Black Marsh where the tower is located. 
 
 It is generally found outside the perimeter of the map and can sometimes spawn near the waypoint. 
 
 Reach the 
 
 Tower Cellar Level 5 and kill 
 
 The Countess .

Description by Khegan

4 
 Encounters on this Quest

Other NPCs & Superuniques:

The Countess

Areas of interest:

Stony Field

Black Marsh

Tower Cellar Level 5 
 
 Items utilised: None

5 
 Lore

The Tower Tome recounts a story of a Countess who was buried alive. Her castle in which so many cruel deeds took place fell rapidly to ruin. Rising over the buried dungeons, a solitary tower is all that remains.

The Countess's fortune was said to be divided among the clergy, although some say that more remains unfound, still buried in the tower. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

Teebling Admin

title:
Sisters to the Slaughter 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Quest
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Andariel can be found in 
 
 Catacombs Level 4 . 
 
 The entrance to the 
 
 Catacombs Level 1 is located inside the 
 
 Cathedral , which is accessible from the 
 
 Inner Cloister .

Andariel is nearly always surrounded by groups of various monsters, so it is recommended that you dispatch them before doing battle with her. 
 
 She has a powerful Poison attack, so having some 
 
 Antidote Potion handy is a good idea. 
 Items that grant Poison Resistance or reduced Poison duration are also useful against 
 
 Andariel .

Description by Stormlash

5 
 Lore

It's time to face the demon queen Andariel, who has corrupted the rogue sisterhood and defiled their ancient monastery.

You must kill her before the Monastery becomes a permanent outpost of hell and the way east lost forever. 
 
 5

 Description

title:
Radament's Lair 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Quest
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
The first entrance to the 
 
 Sewers Level 1 mentioned by 
 
 Atma is up the street, a trap door guarded by 
 
 Greiz .

However, the second entrance can be found downstairs from the docks, left of 
 
 Meshif in the south corner of 
 
 Lut Gholein , which is normally the quickest route to the 
 
 Sewers Level 2 .

The waypoint on 
 
 Sewers Level 2 can normally be found quickly by going left from the entrance, while the entrance to the 
 
 Sewers Level 3 can normally be found quickly by going left from the waypoint (or right from the entrance).

Radament is normally found by going left from the entrance to the 
 
 Sewers Level 3 .

Description by Stormlash

4 
 Encounters on this Quest

Other NPCs & Superuniques:

Radament

Areas of interest:

Sewers Level 3 
 
 Items utilised: None

5 
 Lore

In the sewers below Lut Gholein lurks a horrid creature that hungers for human flesh.

The creature has killed many including Atma's son and husband.

If you destroy it she will reward you. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

 Description

title:
The Horadric Staff 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Quest
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
To complete this quest you must find a 
 
 Horadric Cube , the 
 
 Staff of Kings , the 
 
 Amulet of the Viper , and combine the Staff and Amulet in the 
 
 Horadric Cube and transmute them into 
 
 Horadric Staff . 
 
 You then show that to 
 
 Deckard Cain and he will give you 
 
 The Arcane Sanctuary , and you will be allowed into the Palace of 
 
 Lut Gholein to continue on in the act. 
 
 The 
 
 Horadric Cube is found on the 
 
 Halls of the Dead Level 3 , a dungeon area below the 
 
 Dry Hills . 
 
 The 
 
 Staff of Kings is found in a chest by the 
 
 Coldworm the Burrower on the 
 
 Maggot Lair Level 3 , found below the 
 
 Far Oasis . 
 
 The 
 
 Amulet of the Viper is found in a golden chest on the 
 
 Claw Viper Temple Level 2 , the entrance to the temple is in the 
 
 Valley of Snakes , a small surface area off of the 
 
 Lost City . 
 
 Once you have crafted 
 
 Horadric Staff , you can use it to open an entrance to 
 
 Tal Rasha's Chamber to fight 
 
 Duriel .

Description by Stormlash

4 
 Encounters on this Quest

Other NPCs & Superuniques:

Bloodwitch the Wild

Coldworm the Burrower

Fangskin

Areas of interest:

Halls of the Dead Level 3

Maggot Lair Level 3

title:
The Horadric Staff 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Quest
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
Claw Viper Temple Level 2 
 
 Items utilised:

Horadric Cube

Horadric Scroll

Staff of Kings

Amulet of the Viper

Horadric Staff

5 
 Lore

Cain tells you that The Horadric Mages, after binding Baal within Tal Rasha, magically sealed off his Burial Chamber from the mortal realm.

Those same Mages also crafted fearsome Horadric Staves and imbued them with the special power to open the Chamber's hidden door.

After nearly losing one to the thievery of a rogue sorcerer, they divided all the Horadric Staves into two parts - wooden shaft and metal headpiece - hiding them separately to safeguard them.

The Horadrim foresaw our current plight and designed the hiding places to reveal themselves to worthy heroes like you.

Collect both parts of a Horadric Staff and unite them using a Horadric Cube.

Then, you may enter Tal Rasha's Burial Chamber. 
 
 5 
 Can be used to make Runewords:

7

title:
The Horadric Staff 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Quest
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
To complete this quest you must find a 
 
 Horadric Cube , the 
 
 Staff of Kings , the 
 
 Amulet of the Viper , and combine the Staff and Amulet in the 
 
 Horadric Cube and transmute them into 
 
 Horadric Staff . 
 
 You then show that to 
 
 Deckard Cain and he will give you 
 
 The Arcane Sanctuary , and you will be allowed into the Palace of 
 
 Lut Gholein to continue on in the act. 
 
 The 
 
 Horadric Cube is found on the 
 
 Halls of the Dead Level 3 , a dungeon area below the 
 
 Dry Hills . 
 
 The 
 
 Staff of Kings is found in a chest by the 
 
 Coldworm the Burrower on the 
 
 Maggot Lair Level 3 , found below the 
 
 Far Oasis . 
 
 The 
 
 Amulet of the Viper is found in a golden chest on the 
 
 Claw Viper Temple Level 2 , the entrance to the temple is in the 
 
 Valley of Snakes , a small surface area off of the 
 
 Lost City . 
 
 Once you have crafted 
 
 Horadric Staff , you can use it to open an entrance to 
 
 Tal Rasha's Chamber to fight 
 
 Duriel .

title:
The Tainted Sun 
        
        
        
                                  • Diablo 2 Resurrected Quest
                          
        
         • diablo2.io
text:
To reach 
 
 Claw Viper Temple Level 1 you must move through the surface desert into the 
 
 Lost City . Once you get there the world will suddenly go to night, and will remain that way until you complete the quest. 
 
 If you return to town 
 
 Drognan tells you he's been researching this lengthy eclipse and believes it to be the work of 
 
 Claw Viper . You must explore the perimeter of the 
 
 Lost City , and somewhere around it, randomly located, will be a passageway into a small surface area, the 
 
 Valley of Snakes . 
 
 There are never any monsters there, other than an occasional 
 
 Fire Tower , so go right on in. Once inside the 
 
 Claw Viper Temple Level 1 , search for the 
 
 Claw Viper Temple Level 2 where you'll find the Altar of the Sun, which is causing the darkness outside.

Description by Stormlash

4 
 Encounters on this Quest

Other NPCs & Superuniques:

Fangskin

Areas of interest:

Claw Viper Temple Level 2 
 
 Items utilised: None

5 
 Lore

After entering the Lost City the sky turns dark.

Drognan has been researching this phenomenon and believes it to be the work of the Claw Vipers.

text:
Taken from the Hungarian phrase csákós süveg, meaning peaked cap, these tall, cylindrical hats were made of leather & felt and used in the early 1800s to offer light protection for a soldier's head. They're still used in ceremonial roles as well as in marching bands.

Commonly used to make a ridiculously high defense Fortitude for an Act II mercenary. The 30 strength bonus from 
 
 Andariel's Visage will enable your Act II mercenary to wear any 
 
 Sacred Armor runeword.

 Sacred Armor , let alone a socketed superior ethereal variant, can therefore have substantial trade value.

 4 years ago (pre-Resurrected) https://diablo2.io/post1878550.html?sid=8f41723c07e04178e700ecd226342288#p1878550

Great Hauberk can prove itself as very good (if not the best) option for making Bramble . The explanation is quite simple: 
 
 Skeleton /poison hybrid is wearing 
 
 Marrowwalk with exactly the same 118 str requirement. Nice grim show-off, high defence and no movement penalty combined make this chestplate a great choice for your summoner/novamancer - unless your goal is Enigma .

title:

         • diablo2.io
text:
Archon Plate (Elite)

Light Plate (Normal)

Que-Hegan's Wisdom

Data contributed by Stormlash

2 
 Description

A popular base for the runeword Enigma because of its extremely low strength requirement relative to its base armor. Naked characters with a 
 
 Hellfire Torch and 
 
 Annihilus will have, or be very close to, the 55 strength needed to wear a 
 
 Mage Plate Enigma . As Enigma gives you a significant amount of strength thereafter, it is possible to finish some caster builds without placing any points in strength and invest wholly into vitality. 
 
 A superior, 3-socketed 
 
 Mage Plate can therefore have significant trade value.

Amazon History | Amazon Strategy | Amazon Equipment | Amazon Index | Classes Index

The Amazon 
 This powerful woman warrior belongs to nomadic bands who roam the plains near the South Sea. 
The wandering of these groups often brings them into conflict with other peoples, so the Amazon is 
accustomed to fighting to defend her own. This lifestyle has made her fiercely independent and able 
to weather severe hardship and travel. While her skill with the bow rivals that of the Rogues, the 
Amazon is also adept in the use of spears and other throwing weapons, as well as in hand to hand 
combat. The Amazon is much sought after as a mercenary, in which type of service she will be loyal 
as long as her own ends are also served.

Assassin History | Assassin Index | Classes Index

The Assassin 
 The Assassins are an ancient order originally founded by the Vizjerei to hunt down and eliminate rogue mages within their own ranks.
Employing secret disciplines to combat and resist the magical abilities of their elusive quarry, the Assassin's bag of tricks includes 
traps and other infernal devices, martial arts, and powerful mental abilities. Common people know nothing of the Assassins, but they 
are widely feared and respected by all who employ the magic arts.

Necromancer History | Necromancer Strategy | Necromancer Index | Classes Index

The Necromancer 
 From the steamy recesses of the southern swamps comes a figure cloaked in 
mystery. The Necromancer, as his name implies, is an unseemly form of sorcerer whose spells 
deal with the raising of the dead and the summoning and control of various creatures for his 
purposes. Though his goals are often aligned with those of the forces of Light, some do not 
think that these ends can justify his foul means. Long hours of study in dank mausolea have 
made his skin pale and corpselike, his figure, skeletal. Most people shun him for his peculiar 
looks and ways, but none doubt the power of the Necromancer, for it is the stuff of nightmares.

+ News + Strategy + Ladder + Tournaments + Forums

Barbarian History | Barbarian Strategy | Barbarian Index | Classes Index

The Barbarian 
 The Barbarian, a member of any of several tribes on the fringes of civilization, 
rebuffs the influence of those he sees as soft and weak. Ceaseless clan warfare and the 
constant struggle to survive in the hostile wilderness are evident in the Barbarian's sturdy 
and powerful frame. Though perhaps lacking the sophistication of his civilized contemporaries, the Barbarian has 
an acute awareness of his surroundings. Because of his shamanistic belief in the animal powers 
with whom he identifies, the Barbarian is sometimes associated with stories of lycanthropy. In 
fact, he believes that he can improve his superb battle tactics by calling upon the totemic animal spirits to infuse him with supernormal 
strengths and abilities.

Sorceress History | Sorceress Strategy | Sorceress Index | Classes Index

The Sorceress 
 A rebellious woman who has wrested the secrets of magic use from the male 
dominated Mage-Clans of the East, the Sorceress is an expert in mystical creation ex nihilo. 
Though somewhat lacking in the skills of hand-to-hand combat, she compensates for this weakness with 
fierce combative magic for both offense and defense. Solitary and reclusive, the Sorceress 
acts based on motives and ethics inscrutable to most, and sometimes seems capricious and even 
spiteful. In reality, she understands the struggle between Order and Chaos all too clearly, 
as well as her role as a warrior in this battle.

The Druid 
 The Druids are a race of nomadic warrior-poet-kings. Driven from their homelands long ago by their Barbarian brothers, the Druid tribes 
live primarily in the northern forests. Using mystic secrets passed down through the generations, they summon the elements of fire 
and wind to do their bidding, and command the creatures of the forest to aid them in battle. Shifting from their human forms into 
that of wild beasts, gives them abilities far beyond those of other mortals.

Paladin History | Paladin Strategy | Paladin Index | Classes Index

The Paladin 
 The Knights of Westmarch who felled the armies of mighty Leoric are pure at heart and 
closely follow the teachings of Zakarum, the Religion of the Light. A battle-ready warrior for 
whom faith is a shield, the Paladin fights for what he believes to be right. His steadfastness 
gives him powers to bestow blessings to his friends and wreak cruel justice on foes. There 
are those who call the Paladin an overwrought zealot, but others recognize in him the strength and 
goodness of the Light.

title: The Arreat Summit - Skills: Amazon Javelin and Spear Skills
text:
The Arreat Summit - Skills: Amazon Javelin and Spear Skills

Amazon: Javelin and Spear Skills | Amazon: Passive and Magic Skills | Amazon: Bow and Crossbow Skills 
 Skills Basics | Casting Delays | Skills Index

Skill Level Chart 
 Jab [1], Power Strike [6], Poison Javelin [6], Impale [12], Lightning Bolt [12], Charged Strike [18], Plague Javelin [18], Fend [24], Lightning Strike [30], Lightning Fury [30]

Jab 
 Required Level: 1 
 Prerequisites : None

Hunting in the dense rain forests of the Amazon Islands is fraught with many obstacles. Confining 
overgrowth and fierce indigenous animals conspire to make combat difficult, if not impossible. 
Early in training, Amazon spear-women must learn to overcome these conditions. By honing their 
hunting techniques to the point where they are able to deliver many powerful spear thrusts in rapid 
succession, they learn to finish off one opponent before turning to slay another. The Jab is the 
most basic of the skills designed to accomplish this tactic. 
 Effect : Multiple attacks within the time span of a normal attack, each jab a bit less powerful than the last
up until level 6. 
 Jab is uninterrupted.

text:
Plague Javelin 
 Casting Delay : 4 Seconds 
 Required Level: 18 
 Prerequisites : Poison Javelin [6], Lightning Bolt [12]

Practiced and cunning warriors are able to incorporate poisonous vegetation into the organs of 
wildlife, creating highly infectious and deadly bladders that the Amazons affix to their 
javelins. These javelins strike a target and explode into noxious and putrescent clouds. Entire 
armies of creatures and of men have been slaughtered by the ingenious use of these biological 
agents. The choking cloud created by a plague javelin will incapacitate even the strongest foes. 
 Effect : Similar to Poison Javelin with an additional cloud of expanding poison at the point of impact.

title: The Arreat Summit - Skills: Amazon Javelin and Spear Skills
text:
Possibly the most devastating, and certainly the most spectacular, of all the techniques learned 
by an Amazon warrior is Lightning Fury. The High Priestess of Zerae will teach select Amazons the 
secret of focusing the power of the goddess, consecrating a javelin to become the ultimate weapon 
of vengeance. The energy contained within the javelin is so powerful that its electrical energy 
explodes from its stricken target, releasing bolts of lightning that strike down hapless foes 
nearby. Swift and powerful is the justice administered by an eminent Amazon. 
 Effect : Creates a powerful lightning bolt that releases multiple lightning bolts from target. 
 Lightning Fury will release a set number of lightning bolts towards each of the surrounding monsters when a monster is hit with this spell. The maximum number of bolts are listed as you increase the skill's level. The minimum number of bolts are determined by the amount of monsters in close proximity to the one being targeted. If pierce is available, a second release of bolts can occur if another monster or wall lies behind the original target.

title: The Arreat Summit - Assassin Martial Arts Skills
text:
The Arreat Summit - Assassin Martial Arts Skills

Skill Level Chart

title: The Arreat Summit - Assassin Martial Arts Skills
text:
Tiger Strike [1], Dragon Talon [1], Fists of Fire [6], Dragon Claw [6], Cobra Strike [12], Claws of Thunder [18] Blades of Ice [24], Dragon Tail [18], Dragon Flight [24], Phoenix Strike [30] 
 Intrinsic to the Assassin's arsenal of abilities is her incredible prowess in the mysterious Martial Arts style of the 
Viz-Jaq'taar. Martial Arts skills come in two forms, Charge-up Skills and Finishing Moves. A Charge-up Skill is an attack 
that adds a "charge" for each successive hit within a short time frame. While each Charge-up attack deals normal damage, 
the charges continue to accumulate until triggered or until the time limit runs out. To trigger the accumulated charges, 
strike a monster with either a normal attack or one of the Finishing Moves. A Finishing Move doesn't just trigger the 
release of the accumulated charges-it also adds a powerful effect of its own. Furthermore, by building up a succession 
of different Charge-up Skills, Assassins can generate a potent combination of effects. Assassins are specially trained 
in the use of exotic Claw-class weaponry, and some of their skills can be used only when armed with these weapons. 
 You can use any one or two-handed wea

title: The Arreat Summit - Assassin Martial Arts Skills
text:
pon with Tiger Strike , Cobra Strike , Phoenix Strike which means you can combine those 
skills with a Shield and a good one-handed weapon if you choose. They do not use two weapons at once, however, only
the damage of the first weapon is used. 
 Blades of Ice , Claws of Thunder ,
and Dragon Claw require Katars (Claw-class Weapons). 
 Fists of Fire , Claws of Thunder , and Blades of Ice require one Claw-class weapon and Dragon Claw requires two Claw-class weapons.

title: The Arreat Summit - Assassin Martial Arts Skills
text:
Finishing Move : 
An Assassin is taught to utilize her entire body as a weapon-using this skill, she lets loose a powerful kick to send her opponents flying. 
 
 This skill uses damage listed on boots. Learn more about the exact damage formula here . 
 The damage inflicted by each Dragon Talon kick is based on the type of boots worn. The current weapon equipped does not affect the damage calculation at all (though other secondary effects may still apply - see below.)
Only the first kick in the Dragon Talon sequence gains the effects of any charge-up skills currently charged.

title: The Arreat Summit - Assassin Martial Arts Skills
text:

 + Min / Max damage (so no 3/20/20 charms for kickers) 
 Claw Mastery bonuses (Boots are not Claws!) 
 Melee mods such as Increased Attack Speed (IAS), Crushing Blow, Open Wounds, prevent monster heal, life leech, etc. are not applied from the secondary claw (in a Dual-Claw setup).

title: The Arreat Summit - Skills: Necromancer Summoning Spells
text:
The Arreat Summit - Skills: Necromancer Summoning Spells

Necromancer: Summoning Spells | Necromancer: Poison and Bone Spells | Necromancer: Curses 
 Skills Basics | Casting Delays | Skills Index

title: The Arreat Summit - Skills: Necromancer Summoning Spells
text:
Skill Level Chart 
 Raise Skeleton [1], Skeleton Mastery [1], Clay Golem [6], Golem Mastery [12], Skeletal Mage [12], Blood Golem [18], Summon Resist [24], Iron Golem [24], Fire Golem [30], Revive [30] 
 Minions 
 Minions, such as Golems, Skeletons, Skeletal Mages, Revives, and Hirelings,
may disappear or no longer be under your power if you allow
them to get too far away from you. Check the Automap and make sure you stay
with your Minions. You can use a Town Portal, Dungeon
steps, or Waypoint to collect your Minions. Sometimes Minions may warp in
around you if you get too far away from them, although this does
not always happen. 
 People sometimes get confused when they're trying to calculate the health of minions. Base life is calculated first and THEN add on 
the skeleton mastery life bonus. 
 The Teleport skill is quite handy for for re-collecting your minions, as it instantly recalls all of your minions to your location in addition to its other effects. You can put a Staff with charges of Teleport in your off hand, switch to it quickly with the W key, cast Teleport by using the right mouse button, and switch back to your regular equipment by pressing W again. (You can a

title: The Arreat Summit - Skills: Necromancer Summoning Spells
text:
lso use the Enigma rune word, but a staff with Teleport charges is much easier to find and doesn't occupy your armor slot.) This will make it MUCH easier to keep a large number of Revived monsters with you. 
 Golems 
 
 You can only have one Golem of any type at any time. Once you summon a new Golem, the
old one will immediately disappear. 
 You do not need a monster corpse to summon Golems although the Iron Golem requires an item. 
 Golems, except for Iron Golems, have a fixed defense. 
 The Hit Points and Damage of Golems increase on Nightmare, and again on Hell Difficulty. 
 Summoning a golem right next to a creature, even a boss, will often cause that monster to forget its previous target and focus on the golem instead. Try it, it works! 
 You can safely "spam" (repeatedly cast) Clay Golems and Fire Golems (although Fire Golems cost a lot of mana to spam because they deal damage each time you cast them, as a result of the old Fire Golem exploding). Blood Golems cost you some health, and Iron Golems require an item. Therefore, if you are planning to spam a golem on a boss to reduce the boss' ability to focus on a player, you should go with Clay Golems, Fire Golems, or both. 
 S

title: The Arreat Summit - Skills: Necromancer Summoning Spells
text:
keletons and Skeletal Mages 
 The number of Skeletons or Skeletal Mages you can have is only limited by the number
of skill points you have. Wearing a magic item that raises Skill levels or using
a Skill Boost Shrine also increases the number of Skeletons and Skeletal Mages you can raise. 
When the Skill Boost Shrine effect wears off the extra Skeletons disintegrate. 
 Skeleton's and Skeletal Mage's Life increases on Nightmare Difficulty and again on Hell Difficulty. 
 What are the Attack Ratings for Golems, Skeletons, and Skeletal Mages? 
 The Attack Ratings don't change but these monsters are generated at the caster's level, 
and level plays an important part in the "to hit" formula.

title: The Arreat Summit - Skills: Necromancer Summoning Spells
text:
Raise Skeleton 
 Required Level: 1 
 Prerequisites : None

title: The Arreat Summit - Skills: Necromancer Summoning Spells
text:
Early on, Necromancers learn to control the skeletal remains of deceased creatures. Invoking this skill 
causes a nightmarish jumble of animated bones to rise from a fresh corpse. Animated partially through 
their own will and partially through the summoned spirits of ancient warriors, Necromancers often maintain 
a small host of these reanimated soldiers to do their bidding. 
 Effect : Cast on the corpse of a slain monster. This raises a skeleton warrior that fights for you. 
 Skeletons can work great throughout Normal Difficulty especially with points into Skeleton Mastery (or a point and +Skill Items). Once
you hit Nightmare and Hell difficulty, generally Skeletons will die very quickly. You may wish to, once you hit 
Level 30, upgrade to Revived Monsters and switch to Revived Monsters and Skeletal Mages. However, if you
max Raise Skeleton, Skeleton Mastery, use an Aura from an Act II Mercenary, and have good use of Curses, you can
still continue to use Skeletons in Hell difficulty. 
 Skeletons, when created, have a 5% chance to spawn with a shield. This shield functions to allow 
the skeleton to block, although skeletons only have a 3% chance to block

title: The Arreat Summit - Skills: Necromancer Summoning Spells
The Arreat Summit - Skills: Necromancer Summoning Spells
text:
As the Necromancer's knowledge of the undead improves, he is able to harness and divert more 
powerful spirits to inhabit the corpses of the recently dead. A Necromancer who possesses this skill 
is able to raise skeletons and skeletal mages of a much more powerful variety. 
 Passive Effect : 
Improves the quality of your raised Skeletons, Magi, and Revived. 
 Investing points into Skeleton Mastery will increase Skeleton Hit Points and Damage. Points in Skeleton Mastery will 
also pay off later on if you use Revive.
